PropertyInt.name: lcpTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Timeout for LCP phase, in seconds
PropertyInt.description: Timeout for LCP phase, in seconds

PropertyInt.name: lcpRetries
PropertyInt.help: Number of retries for LCP phase
PropertyInt.description: Number of retries for LCP phase

PropertyString.name: ncpType
PropertyString.help: IP address type (IPv4 or IPv6) for Network Control Protocol
PropertyString.description: IP type (IPv4/IPv6) for Network Control Protocol

PropertyString.name: clientBaseIp
PropertyString.help: The base IP address to be used when creating PPP client addresses. This property is used as an incrementor for the 'clientIpIncr' property
PropertyString.description: Base for IPV4 PPP client address creation

PropertyString.name: clientIpIncr
PropertyString.help: The incrementor for the clientBaseIp property address when multiple PPP addresses are created.
PropertyString.description: Incrementor for IPV4 PPP client address creation

PropertyString.name: serverBaseIp
PropertyString.help: The base IP address to be used when create PPP server addresses. This property is used in conjunction with the 'serverIpIncr' property.
PropertyString.description: Base for IPV4 PPP server address creation

PropertyString.name: serverIpIncr
PropertyString.help: **For internal use only**. For PPP/IP v4 server plugins, exactly one server address is used. As a result, 0.0.0.0 is the only legal value for this property.

PropertyString.name: clientBaseIID
PropertyString.help: The base Link Local Identifier for the PPP client. Used in conjunction with 'clientIIDIncr' as it's incrementor. Valid for IPv6 only
PropertyString.description: Base for IPV6 PPP client address creation

PropertyInt.name: clientIIDIncr
PropertyInt.help: Client link local identifier increment, used in conjuction with the base identifier
PropertyInt.description: Link local Identitfier increment for IPV6 PPP client address creation

PropertyString.name: serverBaseIID
PropertyString.help: The base Link Local Identifier for the PPP server. Used in conjunction with 'serverIIDIncr' as incrementor. Valid for IPv6 only
PropertyString.description: Base for IPV6 PPP server address creation

PropertyInt.name: serverIIDIncr
PropertyInt.help: ** For Internal use only ** Server link local identifier increment, used in conjuction with the base identifier. Note: for PPP server Plugin side one exactly one server IID per client IID is created.

PropertyString.name: ipv6PoolPrefix
PropertyString.help: Pool prefix for the IPv6 IP pool.
PropertyString.description: Pool prefix for the IPv6 IP pool.

PropertyInt.name: ipv6PoolPrefixLen
PropertyInt.help: Pool prefix length. The difference between the address and pool prefix lengths determine the size of the IPv6 IP pool

PropertyInt.name: ipv6AddrPrefixLen
PropertyInt.help: Address prefix length. The difference between the address and pool prefix lengths determine the size of the IPv6 IP pool

PropertyString.name: papUser
PropertyString.help: User name when PAP Authentication is is being used
PropertyString.description: User name when PAP Authentication is is being used

PropertyString.name: papPassword
PropertyString.help: Password when PAP Authentication is being used
PropertyString.description: Password when PAP Authentication is being used

PropertyString.name: chapName
PropertyString.help: User name when CHAP Authentication is being used
PropertyString.description: User name when CHAP Authentication is being used

PropertyString.name: chapSecret
PropertyString.help: Secret when CHAP Authentication is being used
PropertyString.description: Secret when CHAP Authentication is being used

PropertyInt.name: lcpTermTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Timeout for LCP termination, in seconds.
PropertyInt.description: Timeout for LCP termination, in seconds.

PropertyInt.name: ncpTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Timeout for NCP phase, in seconds.
PropertyInt.description: Timeout for NCP phase, in seconds.

PropertyInt.name: authTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Timeout for PPP authentication, in seconds.
PropertyInt.description: Timeout for PPP authentication, in seconds.
